Text.text:
**The attempt to send input to the agent run failed.**

The server returned a 'Not Found' error (status 404), meaning the specified resource—likely a placeholder agent or run ID—could not be located.

> Detail: Not Found

No data was successfully submitted.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Request to submit input to agent run failed with 'Not Found' error

Text.text:
> **Error: Resource not found.**

The attempt to send data to the service endpoint failed with a 'Not Found' response (status 404). The requested path for agents and runs did not exist.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Request to send message failed with not found error

Text.text:
The attempt to send a response to the agent interaction failed.

> The server returned a "Not Found" error, indicating the specified agent run does not exist.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Request to respond to agent run failed with 'Not Found' error

Text.text:
> **Update failed:** The server could not find the specified agent run to update.

An attempt was made to modify details for a particular agent run, but it returned a 'not found' error, indicating the resource doesn't exist at the given location.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Failed to update agent run: not found

Text.text: 所有 8 种 probe 返回 404。现在做最终 events 轮询 + cleanup：

> **Result:** Not Found

Tried to resume a process, but it wasn't located on the server (error 404). No further action was taken.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Resume request failed: process not found

Text.text:
**Failed to send a reply.**

The attempt to post a reply to the conversation returned a 'Not Found' error. The server could not locate the specified conversation or resource.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Reply post failed with 'Not Found' error

Text.text:
> The request to retrieve an answer from the service failed because the specified resource could not be found (404 error).  

No additional details or content were returned.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Request for answer returned 'Not Found' error

Text.text:
> **Request failed**: The attempt to start an agent run on the service returned a 'Not Found' error.

The server responded that the specified resource does not exist.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Failed to start agent run - resource not found

Text.text:
**Deletion attempt failed.**

Tried to remove an agent from the service, but it returned a "not found" error (status 404). The agent with the specified ID does not exist.

> The server responded: "detail: Not Found"

ToolOutputSummary.title: Failed to delete agent: not found

Text.text:
**Cancellation attempt failed.**

The effort to stop the ongoing process did not succeed, as the specific run could not be located.

> Error details: "Not Found" (status code 404)

ToolOutputSummary.title: Failed to cancel the process - item not found

Text.text:
> **Result:** No events found.

The request to retrieve events for the specified agent run returned a 'Not Found' error (HTTP 404). This means the events do not exist at the requested location.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Request for events returned 'Not Found' error
